# Zoya Abbasi — UX/UI & Product Designer Portfolio

Zoya Abbasi is a UX/UI and Product Designer based in Pakistan, available for remote work worldwide. She specializes in mobile app design, web design, and app store creatives (Google Play Store and Apple App Store listings).

## Key Pages

- [Portfolio / Home](https://zoya.tecsynth.com/): Case studies and selected work
- [About](https://zoya.tecsynth.com/about.html): Background, skills, and experience
- [Contact](https://zoya.tecsynth.com/contact.html): Get in touch for collaborations

## About

Zoya Abbasi is a UI/UX and Visual Designer with experience in end-to-end product design, from user research and wireframing to high-fidelity prototypes and delivery. She currently works at Galixo as a UI/UX Designer, with prior experience as a Remote UI/UX Designer at Ninesol and freelance design work since 2023.

Her design approach is modern, approachable, and human-centered, with a focus on diverse global audiences. She has expertise in creating LinkedIn social media designs for events and campaigns, maintaining design systems, and balancing user needs with business goals.

**Skills:** UX Research, Wireframing, Prototyping, User Flows, Visual Design, Graphic Design, Brand Identity, Social Media Design, App Store Creatives
**Tools:** Figma, Adobe XD, Adobe Photoshop, Sketch
**Education:** Certificate in UX Design (Coursera, 2024); BSc Physics, Riphah International University (2020–2024)

## Selected Work

- **Cylo** — Period tracker app: UX research, user flows, wireframing, and high-fidelity UI design
- **Sawa** — Community app: Case study, user research, and UX/UI design
- **Aurora VPN** — VPN app: Case study, UI/UX design
- **TV Remote** — Smart control app: Research, interaction design, UX/UI design
- **AI Medical Scribe** — Healthcare UX/UI design (in progress)
